user_story: As an HR admin, I want to indicate whether an exit questionnaire is performed, so that the questionnaire process is enabled for exits.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Exit Questionnaire screen; When I set "Do you perform exit questionnaire?" to Yes and save; Then the exit questionnaire is enabled

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view the list of exit questions with their type, applicable exit types and responder, so that I can review the questionnaire content.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Exit Questionnaire screen; When the page loads; Then I see a list showing question, question type, exit type(s) and responded by

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new exit question, so that I can gather relevant feedback from departing employees.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Exit Questionnaire screen; When I click Add new question and provide the question text, type, applicable exit types and responder; Then the question is saved and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit an existing exit question, so that I can refine the questionnaire over time.
acceptance_criteria: Given an exit question exists; When I click Edit and modify its details; Then the changes are saved

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to preview the exit questionnaire, so that I can see how it will appear to employees before publishing.
acceptance_criteria: Given questions are configured; When I click Preview exit questionnaire; Then I see the questionnaire as the responder would experience it

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to save and continue to the next step, so that I can complete the exit configuration workflow.
acceptance_criteria: Given I have configured the questionnaire; When I click Save & Next; Then my changes are saved and I advance to the next step
